// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi(C&S)-otodrift.com/eng
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://otodrift.com/eng/
// @version      2024.08.28--06:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==



(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher__
    const searchIndices = ["c395b5", "xxx___xxxxxx", "sssss___ssss"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/otodrift.com+eng.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/lia_.flash_tik_.com/phrase.txt", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();




(function() {
    'use strict';

    // https://otodrift.com/eng/preparing-with-precision-tactics-for-university-admission-tests/


    function showConfirmationPopup(callback) {
        const shouldFillForm = confirm('CODE t@ 15 mars 2024, 11H00, fenoina ve?');
        callback(shouldFillForm);
    }

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("c395b5");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        showConfirmationPopup(function(shouldFillForm) {
            if (shouldFillForm) {

(function() {

    function showConfirmationPopup(callback) {
        const shouldFillForm = confirm('CODE t@ 14 mars 2024, 11H00, fenoina ve?');
        callback(shouldFillForm);

            method: "GET",

            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("0d59b9");//

        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form

                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",

// ===================== 1_2 regi(C)-www.caramantap.com-eng-.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi(C)-www.caramantap.com/eng/
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://www.caramantap.com/eng/
// @version      2024.08.28--06:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==



(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["mofo---gasy", "https://rebrand.ly/9e0ee6"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/www._caram_antap_.com--eng.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/allstnc.txt", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            //console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();





(function() {
    'use strict';

    // https://www.caramantap.com/eng/biological-and-life-sciences-study-in-the-united-kingdom/

    function showConfirmationPopup(callback) {
        const shouldFillForm = confirm('CODE t@ 14 mars 2024, 11H00, fenoina ve?');
        callback(shouldFillForm);
    }

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("9e0ee6");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        showConfirmationPopup(function(shouldFillForm) {
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/www._caram_antap_.com--eng.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Set the second field to a fixed response
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(["MAN1"], 'textarea#vproof'); // Change to "vitat"

                const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",

                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to display a confirmation popup
    function showConfirmationPopup(callback) {
        const shouldFillForm = confirm('CODE t@ 22 mai 2024, 05H00, fenoina ve?');
        callback(shouldFillForm);
    }

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Search for the text "3FcEwtF" on the page  www.masa.biz.id+eng
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("e8cc32");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        showConfirmationPopup(function(shouldFillForm) {
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/www_.masa_.biz_.id%2Beng.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Set the second field to a fixed response
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(["MAS1"], 'textarea#vproof');

                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["4bmchb5", "xxxxxxxxx", "sssssssss"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/www_.ruang_teknisi_.com+eng/link.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/www_.ruang_teknisi_.com+eng/phrs.txt", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",

                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/ikata_ndinas_.com--eng/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/ikata_ndinas_.com--eng/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("de67bf");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/ikata_ndinas_.com--eng/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Load response for vproof
                loadVproofResponse(function(vproofResponse) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses([vproofResponse], 'textarea#vproof');
                });

                // Load random responses for proof2
                const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

})();



(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["https://rebrand.ly/de67bf", "*******rr*********", "*********rr*************", "**r**********rr**********"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/ikata_ndinas_.com--eng/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();


// ===================== 1_2 regi(S)-lokercepat.id.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi(S)-lokercepat.id
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://lokercepat.id/

// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["26833a", "vvvvvvvvvvvvvvv", "mofogasy"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/loker_cepat._id.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/allstnc.txt", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {

    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",

                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];

            method: "GET",

    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];

    for (const index of searchIndices) {

    }

})();

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/aki_.luviz_hea_.com/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/aki_.luviz_hea_.com/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("https://rebrand.ly/ct8rf5i");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/aki_.luviz_hea_.com/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Load response for vproof
                loadVproofResponse(function(vproofResponse) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses([vproofResponse], 'textarea#vproof');
                });

                // Load random responses for proof2
                const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

})();


// ===================== 1_2 regi-V3-dinas.id-eng-.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi-V3-dinas.id/eng/
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://dinas.id/eng/
// @version      2024.06.08--18:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==



(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["https://rebrand.ly/wj5ath6", "mofo_gasy"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/dinas_.id--eng/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/allstnc6.txt", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",

////////////////////code

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/study_au._wakt_ubaca_.com/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/study_au._wakt_ubaca_.com/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("https://rebrand.ly/ug0ydtl");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/study_au._wakt_ubaca_.com/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Load response for vproof
                loadVproofResponse(function(vproofResponse) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses([vproofResponse], 'textarea#vproof');
                });

                // Load random responses for proof2
                const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

})();


// ===================== 1_2 regi-combinesia.web.id-eng-.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi-combinesia.web.id/eng/
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://combinesia.web.id/eng/
// @version      2024.03.10
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["148993", "0000dc00000", "0000000fd0", "000bhg000000"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/combinesia_.web_.id+eng/link.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/combinesia_.web_.id+eng/phrase.txt", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

// ===================== 1_2 regi_a.jakartastudio.com.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_a.jakartastudio.com
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://a.jakartastudio.com/
// @version      2024.08.29--02:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==




(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "lsa9gu1" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("lsa9gu1");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/FuasV31p", 1, function(response1) {
            fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

            // Remplir le deuxième champ (proof_2) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
            // "https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN"  all prase
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            });
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();





(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/a._jaka_rta_studio_.com/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/a._jaka_rta_studio_.com/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("https://rebrand.ly/lsa9gu1");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/a._jaka_rta_studio_.com/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {

                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_aka.caracek.net
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://aka.caracek.net/

// @description  try to take over the world!

// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["803537", "e5e3e2e", "mofogasy"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/9rc6gK0Q", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["msh5yrd", "xxxxxxxxx", "sssssssss"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/aki._caram_antap_.com.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",

                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/aki_.jam_pena_.com/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/aki_.jam_pena_.com/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("https://rebrand.ly/j71lh29");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/aki_.jam_pena_.com/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Load response for vproof
                loadVproofResponse(function(vproofResponse) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses([vproofResponse], 'textarea#vproof');
                });

                // Load random responses for proof2
                const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

})();




// ===================== 1_2 regi_aki.jcinema2018.id.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_aki.jcinema2018.id
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/
// @version      18.08.2023
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';
    
    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "67cbdd" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("67cbdd");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/ak_i.jcin_ema_2018_id.txt", 1, function(response1) {
            fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

            // Remplir le deuxième champ (proof_2) avec 1 réponse aléatoire 
            // "https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN"  all prase
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",

                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            });
        });
    } else {

    }

// ===================== 1_2 regi_aki.luvizhea.com.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_aki.luvizhea.com
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://aki.luvizhea.com/
// @version      2023.11.17--07:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["e9fz56w_", "ct8rf5i_", "bbbb_b", "bbbbbb_"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/aki_.luviz_hea_.com.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "82ecb8" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("82ecb8");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/GHftqHe1", 1, function(response1) {
            fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

            // Remplir le deuxième champ (proof_2) avec 1 réponse aléatoire 
            // "https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN"  all prase
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            });
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

// ===================== 1_2 regi_aki2.duniakicau.net.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_aki2.duniakicau.net
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://aki2.duniakicau.net/
// @version      2023.11.02--16:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["pimydtt", "239884", "mofogasy"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/QN7frSdx", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();
