(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["3ee2a3", "c9f8a6", "bbbbb", "bbbbbb"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/AizTU42W", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",

                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",

        searchForIndex(index);
    }

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["mofo---gasy", "https://rebrand.ly/793d28"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/b._jaka_rta_studio_.com/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/allstnc.txt", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",

                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/b._jaka_rta_studio_.com/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/b._jaka_rta_studio_.com/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("https://rebrand.ly/793d28");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/b._jaka_rta_studio_.com/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Load response for vproof
                loadVproofResponse(function(vproofResponse) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses([vproofResponse], 'textarea#vproof');
                });

                // Load random responses for proof2
                const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

})();

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["11la6hv", "g7x3qn1", "sssssssss"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/blog_._kazu_._co_._id.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",

// ===================== 1_2 regi_business.maklumatkerja.com.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_business.maklumatkerja.com
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://business.maklumatkerja.com/
// @version      2023.10.31--17:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["dc4d42", "80b51d", "mofogasy"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/yGneEcnR", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

// ==UserScript==

// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';
    
    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "2f4d25" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("2f4d25");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/hfvtPT7u", 1, function(response1) {
            fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

            // Remplir le deuxième champ (proof_2) avec 1 réponse aléatoire 
            // "https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN"  all prase
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            });
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

// ===================== 1_2 regi_ecommerce.kicaumania.net.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_ecommerce.kicaumania.net
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://ecommerce.kicaumania.net/
// @version      2023.11.02--16:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["o0thzez", "cccccccc", "mofogasy"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/ecommerce_.kicau_mania._net.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");

                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "https://rebrand.ly/wski92x" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("wski92x");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/dzTtK2QN", 1, function(response1) {
            fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

            // Remplir le deuxième champ (proof_2) avec 1 réponse aléatoire 
            // "https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN"  all prase
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            });
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

// ===================== 1_2 regi_finance.teknoinside.com.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_finance.teknoinside.com
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://finance.teknoinside.com/
// @version      2023.10.31--03:58
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["820b33", "a5d83b", "bbbbb", "bbbbbb"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/Qu8Nf1Xp", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["0eb764", "9dg0dso", "mofogasy"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/fu_yu._aziz_pedia._com.txt", 1, function(response1) {

// ===================== 1_2 regi_fuyu.caramantap.com.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_fuyu.caramantap.com
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://fuyu.caramantap.com/
// @version      2024.01.05--19:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==


(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to display a confirmation popup
    function showConfirmationPopup(callback) {
        const shouldFillForm = confirm('CODE t@ 05 JANVIER 2023, 19H00, fenoina ve?');
        callback(shouldFillForm);
    }

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Search for the text "3FcEwtF" on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("7e7hprd");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        showConfirmationPopup(function(shouldFillForm) {
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/fuy_u._cara_man_tap._com.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Set the second field to a fixed response
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(["CAR1"], 'textarea#vproof');  // Change to "vitat"

                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_fuyu.igun.uk
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://fuyu.igun.uk/

// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["k5n9on0", "xxxxxxxxx", "sssssssss"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/fuyu_.igun_.uk_.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",

                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_fuyu.jcinema2018.id

// @version      24.08.2023--09:34
// @description  try to take over the world!

// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';
    
    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "da780a" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("da780a");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/fuy_u.j_cinema_2018_.id.txt", 1, function(response1) {
            fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

            // Remplir le deuxième champ (proof_2) avec 1 réponse aléatoire 
            // "https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN"  all prase
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            });
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

// ===================== 1_2 regi_fuyu.kicaumania.net.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_fuyu.kicaumania.net
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://fuyu.kicaumania.net/
// @version      2023.11.05--11:30
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["djhz4ci", "nnnnnnnnn", "mofogasy"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/fuyu_.kicau_mania_.net.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {

            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    const searchIndices = ["https://rebrand.ly/6567e2", "mofogasy"];

        if (foundIndex) {

                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

////////////////////code

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/__________/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/__________/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("*****ssss*****");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/__________/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Load response for vproof
                loadVproofResponse(function(vproofResponse) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses([vproofResponse], 'textarea#vproof');
                });

                // Load random responses for proof2
                const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

})();



// ===================== 1_2 regi_fuyu2.duniakicau.net.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_fuyu2.duniakicau.net
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/-- https://fuyu2.duniakicau.net/
// @version      2023.11.15--19:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["36ei13u", "dc2f2a", "bbbbb", "bbbbbb"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/65uvTuqc", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

// ==UserScript==

// @description  try to take over the world!

// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';
    
    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "bce1bd" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("bce1bd");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/i74WTxYF", 1, function(response1) {
            fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

            // Remplir le deuxième champ (proof_2) avec 1 réponse aléatoire 
            // "https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN"  all prase
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            });
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_haru.caramantap.com
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://haru.caramantap.com/
// @version      2024.01.19--02:09
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You

// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==


(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to display a confirmation popup
    function showConfirmationPopup(callback) {
        const shouldFillForm = confirm('CODE t@ 19 JANVIER 2023, 02H00, fenoina ve?');
        callback(shouldFillForm);
    }

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Search for the text "3FcEwtF" on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("ccc2ee");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        showConfirmationPopup(function(shouldFillForm) {
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/haru_.cara_man_tap._com.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Set the second field to a fixed response
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(["CAR1"], 'textarea#vproof');  // Change to "vitat"

                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

// ===================== 1_2 regi_haru.combinesia.web.id.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_haru.combinesia.web.id
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://haru.combinesia.web.id/
// @version      2023.11.17--08:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["7iujbls", "b36bb1", "bbbbb", "bbbbbb"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/haru._combi_nesia._web_.id.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_haru.igun.uk

// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["5z1t4uf", "1i2eydq", "mofogasy"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/haru_._igun_._uk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "c8fee7" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("77d747");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/haru_._ikata_ndinas_._com.txt", 1, function(response1) {
            fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

            // Remplir le deuxième champ (proof_2) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
            // "https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN"  all prase
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            });
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["https://rebrand.ly/yw8j2vx", "https://rebrand.ly/47a46e", "https://rebrand.ly/giu5pcm"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/haru_.jago_web._id/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/haru_.jago_web._id/stnc.txt", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {

    }
