(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/haru_.jago_web._id/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/haru_.jago_web._id/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("https://rebrand.ly/giu5pcm");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/haru_.jago_web._id/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Load response for vproof
                loadVproofResponse(function(vproofResponse) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses([vproofResponse], 'textarea#vproof');
                });

                // Load random responses for proof2
                const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

})();


// ===================== 1_2 regi_haru.jampena.com.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_haru.jampena.com
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://haru.jampena.com/
// @version      2023.11.02--16:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["83c915", "0yxep2z", "mofogasy"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/XK0Hb7hF", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }

            }
        });

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {

        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/haru_.jasapenu_lisartikel_.my_.id/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/haru_.jasapenu_lisartikel_.my_.id/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/haru_.jasapenu_lisartikel_.my_.id/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("https://rebrand.ly/a8e1d5");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/haru_.jasapenu_lisartikel_.my_.id/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Load response for vproof
                loadVproofResponse(function(vproofResponse) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses([vproofResponse], 'textarea#vproof');
                });

                // Load random responses for proof2
                const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

})();

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_haru.jcinema2018.id

// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "c8fee7" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("c8fee7");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/haru_.j_cinema_2018_._id.txt", 1, function(response1) {
            fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

            // Remplir le deuxième champ (proof_2) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
            // "https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN"  all prase
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            });
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {

        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_haru.kicaumania.net

// @author       You

// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["yk3hde4", "vvvvvvv", "bbbbb", "bbbbbb"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/haru_.kicau_mania_.net.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_haru.tokohwanita.com

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["mofo_gasy", "https://rebrand.ly/d34xpfq"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/haru_.tokoh_wanita_.com/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/haru_.tokoh_wanita_.com/stnc.txt", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            //console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/haru_.tokoh_wanita_.com/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/haru_.tokoh_wanita_.com/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("https://rebrand.ly/d34xpfq");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/haru_.tokoh_wanita_.com/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Load response for vproof
                loadVproofResponse(function(vproofResponse) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses([vproofResponse], 'textarea#vproof');
                });

                // Load random responses for proof2
                const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

})();

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_haru2.duniakicau.net
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/
// @version      16.08.2023g
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';
    
    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "904057" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("904057");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/har_u2.dun_iaki_cau.net(904_057).txt", 1, function(response1) {
            fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

            // Remplir le deuxième champ (proof_2) avec 1 réponse aléatoire 
            // "https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN"  all prase
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            });
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["ec3eca", "xxxxxxxxx", "sssssssss"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/jago_web_.id+inmark/link.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/jago_web_.id+inmark/phrase.txt", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_jampena.com/eco/
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://jampena.com/eco/

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["mofo_gasy", "https://rebrand.ly/906fop1"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/jam_pena_.com--eco/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/jam_pena_.com--eco/stnc.txt", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });

            //console.error('Indice non trouvé.');

/////////////////////////////////////////CODE/////////////////////////////////////////

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/jam_pena_.com--eco/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/jam_pena_.com--eco/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("https://rebrand.ly/906fop1");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/jam_pena_.com--eco/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Load response for vproof
                loadVproofResponse(function(vproofResponse) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses([vproofResponse], 'textarea#vproof');
                });

                // Load random responses for proof2
                const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

})();

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["https://rebrand.ly/nh5m7hj", "**r**********rr**********"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/jcine_ma2018_.id--eng/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {

            method: "GET",

                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }

            }
        });
    }

// ===================== 1_2 regi_kelasip.com-eng-.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_kelasip.com/eng/
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://kelasip.com/eng/
// @version      2024.07.14--08:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/kela_sip_.com--eng/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/kela_sip_.com--eng/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("https://rebrand.ly/979768");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/kela_sip_.com--eng/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Load response for vproof
                loadVproofResponse(function(vproofResponse) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses([vproofResponse], 'textarea#vproof');
                });

                // Load random responses for proof2
                const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

})();






(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["https://rebrand.ly/979768", "***_****_***"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/kela_sip_.com--eng/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

// ===================== 1_2 regi_kisetsu.igun.uk.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_kisetsu.igun.uk
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/
// @version      2023.09.07--10:29
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "46e0ad" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("46e0ad");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/kise_tsu_igun_.uk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
            fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

            // Remplir le deuxième champ (proof_2) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
            // "https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN"  all prase
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            });
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_kisetsu.jcinema2018.id

// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';
    
    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "36c0e1" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("36c0e1");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/kise_tsu._jcinema_2018_.id.txt", 1, function(response1) {
            fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

            // Remplir le deuxième champ (proof_2) avec 1 réponse aléatoire 
            // "https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN"  all prase
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {

// ===================== 1_2 regi_kisetsu.luvizhea.com.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_kisetsu.luvizhea.com
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://kisetsu.luvizhea.com/
// @version      2023.11.19--07:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["28daf1", "dddddddd", "sssssssss"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/kise_tsu._luvi_zhea_.com.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/kyo_.iqipedia_.com/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {

                    const sources = [
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
