(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/kyo_.iqipedia_.com/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/kyo_.iqipedia_.com/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("https://rebrand.ly/a12469");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/kyo_.iqipedia_.com/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Load response for vproof
                loadVproofResponse(function(vproofResponse) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses([vproofResponse], 'textarea#vproof');
                });

                // Load random responses for proof2
                const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

})();




// ===================== 1_2 regi_laptop.dapodik.co.id.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_laptop.dapodik.co.id
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/
// @version      17.08.2023
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';
    
    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "013b4a" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("013b4a");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/laptop_.dap_odik_.co_.id.txt", 1, function(response1) {
            fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

            // Remplir le deuxième champ (proof_2) avec 1 réponse aléatoire 
            // "https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN"  all prase
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            });
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

// ===================== 1_2 regi_lia.flashtik.com.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_lia.flashtik.com
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://lia.flashtik.com/
// @version      2023.12.26--12:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["1178dd", "9jlcqbf", "sssssssss"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/lia_.flash_tik_.com/link.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/lia_.flash_tik_.com/phrase.txt", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["https://rebrand.ly/j0hlb61", "https://rebrand.ly/801db9"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/loker_cepat_.id--international/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",

                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/loker_cepat_.id--international/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/loker_cepat_.id--international/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("https://rebrand.ly/801db9");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/loker_cepat_.id--international/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                    fillFormWithRandomResponses([vproofResponse], 'textarea#vproof');

                const sources = [

                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');

    // Rechercher le texte "26833a" sur la page

    if (foundIndex) {

                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",

        });
    } else {

    }

// @name         1:1:2 regi_maklumatkerja.com/eng/
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://maklumatkerja.com/eng/

// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["https://rebrand.ly/6y846o1", "xxxxx_xxxx", "sssss_ssss"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/makl_umat_kerja.com+eng/link.txt", 1, function(response1) {

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/makl_umat_kerja.com+eng/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/makl_umat_kerja.com+eng/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("https://rebrand.ly/6y846o1");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/makl_umat_kerja.com+eng/link.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                    fillFormWithRandomResponses([vproofResponse], 'textarea#vproof');

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {

        }
    }

// ===================== 1_2 regi_manufacturing.reviewtekno.com(kj3xuhr).user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_manufacturing.reviewtekno.com(kj3xuhr)
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/
// @version      0.1
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';
    
    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "kj3xuhr" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("kj3xuhr");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/y90DAHGY", 1, function(response1) {
            fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

            // Remplir le deuxième champ (proof_2) avec 1 réponse aléatoire 
            // "https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN"  all prase
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            });
        });
    } else {

})();

// ===================== 1_2 regi_mortgage.reviewtekno.com.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_mortgage.reviewtekno.com
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/
// @version      20.08.2023--12:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';
    
    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "c325dd" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("c325dd");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/mort_gage._review_tekno._com.txt", 1, function(response1) {
            fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

            // Remplir le deuxième champ (proof_2) avec 1 réponse aléatoire 
            // "https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN"  all prase
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            });
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

// ===================== 1_2 regi_natsu.ahlinesia.com.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_natsu.ahlinesia.com
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://natsu.ahlinesia.com/
// @version      2024.04.25--00:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["7ec08e", "2yk0twk", "mofogasy"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/7uixrA3D", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

// ===================== 1_2 regi_natsu.caramantap.com.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_natsu.caramantap.com
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://natsu.caramantap.com/
// @version      2024.01.05--12:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to display a confirmation popup
    function showConfirmationPopup(callback) {
        const shouldFillForm = confirm('CODE t@ 05 JANVIER 2023, 09H00, fenoina ve?');
        callback(shouldFillForm);
    }

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Search for the text "3FcEwtF" on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("190c2d");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        showConfirmationPopup(function(shouldFillForm) {
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/natsu_.caram_antap._com.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Set the second field to a fixed response
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(["MAN01"], 'textarea#vproof');  // Change to "vitat"

                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {

            method: "GET",

                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");

        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/daRhybg2", 1, function(response1) {

// ===================== 1_2 regi_natsu.jasapenulisartikel.my.id.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_natsu.jasapenulisartikel.my.id
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://natsu.jasapenulisartikel.my.id/
// @version      2025.000000000000
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==


/*
const key_code = "    ";
*/

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["https://cutt.ly/SrFoT1G1", "https://cutt.ly/SrF____oT1G1"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/natsu_.jasape_nulisar_tikel_.my_.id/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/natsu_.jasape_nulisar_tikel_.my_.id/stnc.txt", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            //console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_natsu.otodrift.com

// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "hz0kcg3" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("hz0kcg3");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/natsu_.oto_drift_._com.txt", 1, function(response1) {
            fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

            // Remplir le deuxième champ (proof_2) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
            // "https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN"  all prase
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            });
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["ntu9ujz", "l5eyu21", "bbbbb", "bbbbbb"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/vMtJUQMY", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

// ===================== 1_2 regi_natsu.ruangteknisi.com.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_natsu.ruangteknisi.com
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/
// @version      0.1
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';
    //regi_natsu.ruangteknisi.com(40642d)
    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "40642d" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("40642d");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/s8zrnpTR", 1, function(response1) {
            fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

            // Remplir le deuxième champ (proof_2) avec 1 réponse aléatoire 
            // "https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN"  all prase
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            });
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

// ===================== 1_2 regi_optimaprep.co.id-uni.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_optimaprep.co.id/uni
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://optimaprep.co.id/uni/
// @version      2024.03.14--12:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==


(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to display a confirmation popup
    function showConfirmationPopup(callback) {
        const shouldFillForm = confirm('CODE t@ 14 mars 2024, 11H00, fenoina ve?');
        callback(shouldFillForm);
    }

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("3e90c7");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        showConfirmationPopup(function(shouldFillForm) {
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/optima_prep_.co_.id%2Buni/1.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Set the second field to a fixed response
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(["OPT1"], 'textarea#vproof'); // Change to "vitat"

                const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {

                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();


// ===================== 1_2 regi_s1.caracek.net.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_s1.caracek.net
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://s1.caracek.net/
// @version      2023.11.15--19:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["7qavrpj", "c89494", "mofogasy"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/vmshSm43", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

// ==UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';
    
    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "mek8nzk" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("mek8nzk");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/stu_dy.wakt_ubaca.com.txt", 1, function(response1) {

                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            });
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",

                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            });
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

// ===================== 1_2 regi_studych.caracek.net.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_studych.caracek.net
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/
// @version      2023.10.30--16:56
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["b359d9", "4bvlweg", "mofogasy"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/study_ch._cara_cek._net.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_studyde.dapodik.co.id(lbyhjuw)
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/
// @version      0.1
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';
    
    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "lbyhjuw" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("lbyhjuw");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/AEBkSGE2", 1, function(response1) {
            fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

            // Remplir le deuxième champ (proof_2) avec 1 réponse aléatoire 
            // "https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN"  all prase
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            });
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "puems12" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("puems12");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",

// ===================== 1_2 regi_studyde.materiolahraga.com.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_studyde.materiolahraga.com
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://studyde.materiolahraga.com/
// @version      2024.03.31--07:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==



(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/study_de._materi_olah_raga_.com/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/study_de._materi_olah_raga_.com/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("16127d");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/study_de._materi_olah_raga_.com/link.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Load response for vproof
                loadVproofResponse(function(vproofResponse) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses([vproofResponse], 'textarea#vproof');
                });

                // Load random responses for proof2
                const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

})();

// ===================== 1_2 regi_studyjp.carigaji.com.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_studyjp.carigaji.com
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://studyjp.carigaji.com/
// @version      2023.11.01--06:00
