// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["fa432d", "6f705b", "mofogasy"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/study_jp_._cari_gaji._com.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_studysg.carigaji.com
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/-- https://studysg.carigaji.com/
// @version      2023.11.02--16:00

// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {

                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");

            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "3d6573" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("3d6573");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/stud_yus_.ikat_andin_as._com.txt", 1, function(response1) {
            fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

            // Remplir le deuxième champ (proof_2) avec 1 réponse aléatoire 
            // "https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN"  all prase
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            });
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_studyusa.waktubaca.com

// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';
    
    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "a4400e" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("a4400e");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/0dPPGEb0", 1, function(response1) {
            fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

            // Remplir le deuxième champ (proof_2) avec 1 réponse aléatoire 
            // "https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN"  all prase
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",

// ===================== 1_2 regi_sui.iqipedia.com.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_sui.iqipedia.com
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://sui.iqipedia.com/
// @version      2024.05.17--19:30
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/sui_.iqip_edia_.com/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/sui_.iqip_edia_.com/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("https://rebrand.ly/fugv805");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/sui_.iqip_edia_.com/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Load response for vproof
                loadVproofResponse(function(vproofResponse) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses([vproofResponse], 'textarea#vproof');
                });

                // Load random responses for proof2
                const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

})();

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_tech.kazu.co.id
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://tech.kazu.co.id/
// @version      2023.11.19--07:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["2xqay2x", "dddddddd", "sssssssss"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/tech_.kazu_.co_.id.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_travel.maklumatkerja.com

// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["f9979a", "mj5jvwn", "mofogasy"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/travel_.mak_lumat_kerja._com.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();


// ===================== 1_2 regi_travel.materiolahraga.com.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_travel.materiolahraga.com
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://travel.materiolahraga.com/
// @version      2024.04.17--11:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to display a confirmation popup
    function showConfirmationPopup(callback) {
        const shouldFillForm = confirm('CODE t@ 14 mars 2024, 11H00, fenoina ve?');
        callback(shouldFillForm);
    }

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Search for the text jampena.com+eng
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("https://rebrand.ly/6ty6xqg");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        showConfirmationPopup(function(shouldFillForm) {
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/travel_.mater_iolah_raga_.com.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Set the second field to a fixed response
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(["OLA1"], 'textarea#vproof'); // Change to "vitat"

                const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

// ===================== 1_2 regi_travel.noos.co.id (1).user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_travel.noos.co.id
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://travel.noos.co.id/
// @version      2023.10.31--03:58
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["b0afa9", "bbbbbbb", "bbbbb", "bbbbbb"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/travel._noos._co_.id.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                        "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_travel.reviewtekno.com(9c9c16)
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/
// @version      0.1
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==

(function() {
    'use strict';
    
    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher le texte "9c9c16" sur la page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("9c9c16");

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Remplir le premier champ (proof_1) avec 1 réponse aléatoire
        getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/md0S4Xv8", 1, function(response1) {
            fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

            // Remplir le deuxième champ (proof_2) avec 1 réponse aléatoire 
            // "https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN"  all prase
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                // Remplir le troisième champ (proof_3) avec 2 réponses aléatoires depuis différentes sources
                const sources = [
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/1UBfN03Z",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/9SbdJnYs",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/tG5Uq3HV",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/sCcL4fmc",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/khC5ubQ3",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/HSSGN2bp",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/cvT4CAh9",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/bMpidwrb",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/0YsMUrcJ",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/PJqLfHAH",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XRHhMWXa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/QsLRXt4f",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/XpBTujRa",
                    "https://pastebin.com/raw/VdR1JZaL"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            });
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

})();

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["https://rebrand.ly/yw8__j2vx", "https://rebrand.ly/47a__46e", "https://rebrand.ly/735aaa"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/uk_.dinas_.id/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {

                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/uk_.dinas_.id/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/uk_.dinas_.id/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("https://rebrand.ly/735aaa");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/uk_.dinas_.id/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Load response for vproof
                loadVproofResponse(function(vproofResponse) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses([vproofResponse], 'textarea#vproof');
                });

                // Load random responses for proof2
                const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

})();


// ===================== 1_2 regi_umi.iqipedia.com.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2 regi_umi.iqipedia.com
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://umi.iqipedia.com/
// @version      2025.10.27--10:40
// @description  try to take over the world!

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["2c1b6d", "64c03d", "bb.bb.b"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/PF3sTHy9", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://pastebin.com/raw/WZDb4YjN", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();













(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/umi_.iqipedia_.com/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/umi_.iqipedia_.com/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("64c03d");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/umi_.iqipedia_.com/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Load response for vproof
                loadVproofResponse(function(vproofResponse) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses([vproofResponse], 'textarea#vproof');
                });

                // Load random responses for proof2
                const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

})();

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["mofo_gasy", "https://rebrand.ly/zwylm85"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/vivo_global_.id--eco/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/vivo_global_.id--eco/stnc.txt", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",

                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {

    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,

                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {

    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,

                }

            }
        });
    }

        }
    }

            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/www_.review_tekno_.com--eng/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/www_.review_tekno_.com--eng/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("https://rebrand.ly/e251a0");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/www_.review_tekno_.com--eng/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];

                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

// @version      2024.07.31--21:00
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==



/*
			const key_code = "AHL1";
*/

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["https://rebrand.ly/5a41df", "https://rebrand.ly/c.t8.r.f.5i"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/ahli_nesia_.com--ny/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/aki_.luviz_hea_.com/stnc.txt", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                        "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            //console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();






(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/ahli_nesia_.com--ny/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/ahli_nesia_.com--ny/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("https://rebrand.ly/5a41df");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/ahli_nesia_.com--ny/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });

                // Load response for vproof
                loadVproofResponse(function(vproofResponse) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses([vproofResponse], 'textarea#vproof');
                });

                // Load random responses for proof2
                const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                });
            } else {
                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
    }

    // Function to fill the form with random responses
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

})();


// ===================== 1_2-regi-V3-aki.ahlinesia.com.user.js =====================

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2-regi-V3-aki.ahlinesia.com
// @namespace    http://tampermonkey.net/--https://aki.ahlinesia.com/
// @version      2024.06.3102--10:49
// @description  try to take over the world!
// @author       You
// @match        https://sproutgigs.com/jobs/submit-task.php*
// @icon         https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?sz=64&domain=sproutgigs.com
// @grant        GM_xmlhttpRequest
// ==/UserScript==


(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Fonction pour récupérer plusieurs réponses aléatoires depuis une source externe
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Fonction pour remplir le formulaire avec les réponses aléatoires
    function fillFormWithRandomResponses(responses, textareaId) {
        const textarea = document.querySelector(textareaId);
        if (textarea) {
            textarea.value = responses.join('\n');
        }
    }

    // Liste des indices à rechercher
    const searchIndices = ["https://rebrand.ly/gnjl7t7", "https://rebrand.ly/0c0afc"];

    // Fonction pour rechercher un indice
    function searchForIndex(index) {
        const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes(index);

        if (foundIndex) {
            // Remplir les champs du formulaire avec des réponses aléatoires ici
            getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/aki_.ahli_nesia_.com/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {
                fillFormWithRandomResponses(response1, 'textarea#proof_1.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/aki_.ahli_nesia_.com/stnc.txt", 1, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                    const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                    ];

                    getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response3) {
                        fillFormWithRandomResponses(response3, 'textarea#proof_3.form-control.alert-on-type-task');
                    });
                });
            });
        } else {
            console.error('Indice non trouvé.');
        }
    }

    // Rechercher chaque indice dans la liste
    for (const index of searchIndices) {
        searchForIndex(index);
    }

})();

(function() {
    'use strict';

    // Function to get random responses from a source URL
    function getRandomResponses(url, count, callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: url,
            onload: function(response) {
                const responses = response.responseText.split("\n");
                const randomResponses = [];
                for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
                    const randomIndex = Math.floor(Math.random() * responses.length);
                    const randomResponse = responses[randomIndex].trim();
                    randomResponses.push(randomResponse);
                }
                callback(randomResponses);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load confirmation message from an external URL
    function loadConfirmationMessage(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/aki_.ahli_nesia_.com/msg.txt", // Remplacer par le lien du message de confirmation
            onload: function(response) {
                const message = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(message);
            }
        });
    }

    // Load response for vproof from an external URL
    function loadVproofResponse(callback) {
        GM_xmlhttpRequest({
            method: "GET",
            url: "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/aki_.ahli_nesia_.com/cod.txt", // Remplacer par le lien de la réponse pour vproof
            onload: function(response) {
                const vproofResponse = response.responseText.trim();
                callback(vproofResponse);
            }
        });
    }

    // Search for the text "   " on the page
    const foundIndex = document.body.textContent.includes("https://rebrand.ly/gnjl7t7");//

    if (foundIndex) {
        // Display a confirmation popup before filling the form
        loadConfirmationMessage(function(message) {
            const shouldFillForm = confirm(message);
            if (shouldFillForm) {
                // Fill the form with random responses
                getRandomResponses("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/REGI/aki_.ahli_nesia_.com/lnk.txt", 1, function(response1) {

                });

                    fillFormWithRandomResponses([vproofResponse], 'textarea#vproof');
                });

                // Load random responses for proof2
                const sources = [
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/1.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/2.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/3.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/4.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/5.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/6.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/7.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/8.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/9.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/10.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/11.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/12.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/13.txt",
                    "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/MieJM98/A-S-A/main/AD/14.txt"
                ];
                getRandomResponses(sources[Math.floor(Math.random() * sources.length)], 2, function(response2) {
                    fillFormWithRandomResponses(response2, 'textarea#proof_2.form-control.alert-on-type-task');

                console.log('User chose not to fill the form.');
            }
        });

        console.error('Indice non trouvé.');

// ==UserScript==
// @name         1:1:2-regi-V3-apola.co/eco/
